name: ha-integration-knowledge
tagline: Reference guide of coding conventions and quality-scale rules for building and reviewing Home Assistant integrations.
verdict: Solid, safe reference content: concrete do/don't rules, sensible file-splitting for platform-specific detail (diagnostics, repairs). Its broad 'primary reference for any integration' claim carries no stated exclusions, and it has no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Description claims to be 'your primary reference' for all integration work with no stated exclusions or pointers to more specific skills.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
